first_meeting_locked.speaker: Roxy
first_meeting_locked.text: The good cabinet is still pretending it has standards.

first_meeting_locked.speaker: Roxy
first_meeting_locked.text: Come back when you have beaten something louder than the carpet.

first_meeting_locked.speaker: Roxy
first_meeting_locked.text: I will be here, defending my undefeated record against boredom.

broken_high_score_intro.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_intro.text: You look like someone who loses to menus.

broken_high_score_intro.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_intro.text: Good news: the Broken High Score cabinet also loses to menus.

broken_high_score_intro.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_intro.text: It says the target is 9999 because it has commitment issues.

broken_high_score_intro.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_intro.text: Scoreboards love lying when nobody checks the math.

broken_high_score_intro.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_intro.text: Go prove the fake target is fake.

broken_high_score_intro.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_intro.text: Try not to celebrate like a tutorial pop-up.

broken_high_score_hint.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_hint.text: Hint two: the cabinet knows it.

broken_high_score_hint.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_hint.text: Hint three: bully the smaller number until it confesses.

broken_high_score_hint.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_hint.text: If a scoreboard screams 9999, it is overcompensating.

broken_high_score_hint.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_hint.text: The lie has cracks big enough to park a joystick in.

broken_high_score_hint.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_hint.text: The target is not the target.

broken_high_score_hint.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_hint.text: Next it will say INSERT COIN while stealing your confidence.

broken_high_score_completion.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_completion.text: That usually does not happen after a reset.

broken_high_score_completion.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_completion.text: Blank names are bad scoreboard manners.

broken_high_score_completion.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_completion.text: Corrupted rankings do that when they remember a player and refuse the label.

broken_high_score_completion.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_completion.text: Do not let it go to your head.

broken_high_score_completion.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_completion.text: You still walk like a tutorial.

broken_high_score_completion.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_completion.text: Now go see Mr. Byte before his Truth Filter starts grading on a curve.

broken_high_score_completion.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_completion.text: He has been itching to sort somebody's contradictions all night.

broken_high_score_completion.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_completion.text: Free tip, since you earned it: his filter quizzes you on the last night.

broken_high_score_completion.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_completion.text: The staff record terminal across the row just unlocked the shift log. Read it first.

truth_filter_completion_nudge.speaker: Roxy
truth_filter_completion_nudge.text: Huh. The Filter actually shut up for once.

truth_filter_completion_nudge.speaker: Roxy
truth_filter_completion_nudge.text: That thing has been arguing with itself since before you walked in here.

truth_filter_completion_nudge.speaker: Roxy
truth_filter_completion_nudge.text: Whatever it just coughed up, Mr. Byte is the one who files it.

truth_filter_completion_nudge.speaker: Roxy
truth_filter_completion_nudge.text: Go make him explain it. He lives for that. It is the only thing he lives for.

repeat_after_completion.speaker: Roxy
repeat_after_completion.text: The rankings stopped twitching when you walked by.

repeat_after_completion.speaker: Roxy
repeat_after_completion.text: That is either respect or bad wiring.

broken_high_score_replay_offer.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_replay_offer.text: Back at my cabinet, 04? The board tells the truth now because of you.

broken_high_score_replay_offer.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_replay_offer.text: Does not mean I will let you pad your score in peace.

broken_high_score_replay_offer.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_replay_offer.text: Well? Coin up or step aside.

broken_high_score_replay_return.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_replay_return.text: Look at that. A fixed board, zero stakes, and you still played like rent was due.

broken_high_score_replay_return.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_replay_return.text: The number does not matter anymore.

broken_high_score_replay_return.speaker: Roxy
broken_high_score_replay_return.text: That is exactly why it looks good on you.

post_reveal.speaker: Roxy
post_reveal.text: That explains the blank high score.

post_reveal.speaker: Roxy
post_reveal.text: Also hard to trash-talk one, but I am adapting.

post_reveal.speaker: Roxy
post_reveal.text: You built a score the arcade could not name.

post_reveal.speaker: Roxy
post_reveal.text: Then you came back and beat the cabinet anyway.

post_reveal.speaker: Roxy
post_reveal.text: That is also kind of impressive.

post_reveal.speaker: Roxy
post_reveal.text: Rematch privilege granted. Do not make it emotional.
